name: the smaller cooking fires
identity: A secondary cooking area within the camp, used by the women to prepare meals. It is smaller and more intimate than the main fire pit.
current_status: Being used to prepare the morning meal, with the women actively stirring a thickened stew and baking flatbread on hot stones.

appearance.value: Smaller than the main fire pit, with a rustic and functional setup for cooking.

purpose.value: Primary site for meal preparation by the women in the camp.

volatile_state.condition: Active and busy with cooking preparations.
volatile_state.location: Within the camp, near the main fire pit.
volatile_state.current_activity: Preparing a thickened stew and flatbread for the group.
